section.heading: Coverage paid up at 30 years and age 70
section.chapeau: Effective October 1, 2008, a reduction under this subchapter in the retired or retainer pay of a person electing an annuity under this subchapter may not be made for any month after the later of—

paragraph.content: the month that is the 360th month for which that person’s retired or retainer pay is reduced pursuant to such an election; and
the month during which that person attains 70 years of age.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 106–65, div. A, title VI, § 655(a), Oct. 5, 1999, 113 Stat. 667.)
